metadata.description: Narwhal plugins — SEO & GEO/LLMO scanning for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: narwhal
plugins.description: Audit a page or whole site for SEO and GEO/LLMO (AI-search) visibility: technical SEO, content/E-E-A-T, schema.org JSON-LD, and citability for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Local-first, no API keys.
